overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets under massive elevated highways. The player character crosses a street with pedestrians and walks along sidewalks lined with digital billboards and towering megastructures, showcasing the dense urban environment of Night City.

events.description: large dark delivery truck drives past from right to left across the intersection
camera approaches the crosswalk and begins to angle toward the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street under the massive overpass structure, approaching a pedestrian crossing

notable_agents.action: large box truck moving slowly across the road from right to left

entered.detail: massive elevated highway with concrete pillars spanning overhead
large purple utility container covered in colorful graffiti tags
tall modern street lamp illuminating the road below

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a dark street beneath a massive elevated highway. A large truck passes by on the left as the camera walks forward along the asphalt road. A graffiti-covered electrical box sits near the curb, and the area is sparsely populated with artificial lighting from street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk with yellow safety stripes

events.description: stepping from the road onto the sidewalk and joining a group of waiting pedestrians
beginning to cross the wide yellow-striped crosswalk with the crowd

agents.ego_description: joining a group of pedestrians and crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk together

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with cybernetic arm prosthetics and blue patterned pants walking ahead

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
paved pedestrian walkway with square concrete tiles

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a wide crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, joining a crowd of pedestrians. A distinctive shirtless character with cybernetic arms walks ahead. The overpass structure shifts to the left as the camera crosses the open area toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with digital advertising screens

events.description: entering the covered sidewalk area dominated by large glowing digital billboards
passing under intense purple neon lighting from a storefront

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk past palm trees and large digital billboards displaying advertisements

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboards displaying glowing blue and white advertisements with Korean text
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk between the road and buildings
storefront with bright purple neon lighting and signage
yellow and green painted concrete seating areas

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered commercial sidewalk lined with massive digital billboards and palm trees. The area is illuminated by neon lights including a distinctive purple storefront glow. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the concrete path under the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon with towering megastructures

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the massive building structures overhead
passing under an elevated highway ramp entering a narrower passage

agents.ego_description: walking through the dense urban canyon while looking up at the massive architectural structures and elevated walkways

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with complex geometric architecture and stacked platforms
curved elevated roadway structure with green safety barriers
bright red illuminated signage on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into a narrow urban canyon between massive structures, tilting up to reveal a towering megabuilding with complex architecture. The environment feels more enclosed with elevated ramps overhead and red neon signs illuminating the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, industrial underpass into the vibrant, towering heart of a neon-lit cyberpunk district. It begins on a dark asphalt street beneath a massive elevated highway, passing a graffiti-covered electrical box as a large truck rolls by. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens up into a wide crosswalk where the viewer joins a crowd of pedestrians, including a shirtless man with cybernetic arms, while the overpass structure shifts to the left. The scene then transitions onto a covered commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, where the lighting shifts to a vivid purple neon glow. Finally, the camera enters a narrow urban canyon, tilting upward to reveal a towering megabuilding and complex overhead ramps illuminated by red neon signs.
